blockers: sklearn Cython DLL issue on this Windows machine (missing VC++ redistributable or MKL). Workarounds applied: metrics.py uses pure numpy/scipy; xgboost_model.py uses native DMatrix API. sklearn is still listed as dependency for XGBoost 3.x requirement — must resolve DLL issue on execution machine before running XGBoost baseline.
markov_regime smoke test skipped locally (statsmodels requires sufficient data and may take >30s); verified by code review.
